betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Military Grade Circuit Board§f is an advanced electronic component.

§eTask:§f Craft 1x §bMilitary Grade Circuit§f (hbm:circuit)

§eCircuit Hierarchy:§f
Microchip → Integrated → §bMilitary Grade§f (this) → Versatile

§eCrafting:§f
Check NEI for recipe - requires higher-tier components than Integrated circuits.

§eUses:§f
• Advanced machinery control systems
• Automation equipment
• Many mid-to-late game recipes

§aTip:§f Automate production - many recipes require bulk quantities.
